diagnostics.headline: deaths 3 vs your 5 norm — above your level

notes: Their main damage was Greystone (26k physical); 2/5 of you itemized armor.
Enemy ran 4/5 on or near their meta core — they drafted and built optimally; match it.
They traded the fight for Fangtooth across the map — you won bodies but gave the objective.
They traded the fight for Primal Fangtooth across the map — you won bodies but gave the objective.
You opened it a 1-body down (4v5) — the numbers were lost before the fight was.
Anathema 🇦🇷 (offlane) was dead — went down 26s earlier, so this was never a full-strength fight.
Mr_Meat31 (carry) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-1 into a numbers advantage.
Goldilocks324 (support) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-1 into a numbers advantage.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Riktor Riplash (pull), Riktor Shock Therapy (silence 0.8s), Riktor Skewer (suppress 1.25s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Riktor) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
ourKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
ourKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
ourKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
ourKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

ourKits.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
ourKits.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
ourKits.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
ourKits.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

ourKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
ourKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
ourKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
ourKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
ourKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

enemyKits.combo: Scar mark → Obliterate homing missiles → Reckoning 1v1 realm ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Reckoning a target into the Nether Realm and crit them down 1v1
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up if his 1v1 stalls
enemyKits.playAgainst: the ult is a 1v1 — peel the realmed ally can't help, so don't be caught alone; he's crit-reliant early-weak

enemyKits.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
enemyKits.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
enemyKits.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

enemyKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
enemyKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
enemyKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

enemyKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
enemyKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
enemyKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

enemyKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
enemyKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
enemyKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
